channel.title: Bill of Materials :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: InfoQuantity column denotes how many required, but the Description URL often refers to a “pack” with a bulk quantity Enclosure/Case Quantity Description 1 Enclosure 3 DIN Rails (24” x 5Pcs) 14 Terminal Blocks 7 Terminal Block Jumper 1 Hookup Wire - 6 Colors 1 C14 Power Plug 1 Universal AC Power Cable (C13) 1 Heat Shrink Tubing 1 Bolts and Nuts 3 Ethernet Patch Cables Modbus Devices Quantity Description 2 Arduino UNO WiFi REV2 2 W5100 Ethernet Network Shield 2 PoE Splitter Adapter 48V to 12V, 5.5x2.1mm DC, 2 pack 1 LED - Red - 5mm 1 Resistor 1K ohm 2 Momentary Push Button - Normally Open 6 Breadboard Jumper Wire Digital I/O Components Quantity Description 1 Emergency Latching Stop Button 1 RED/GREEN Indicator LEDs 1 AC to 12VDC DIN-Rail Power Supply
